items: inside arm elbow, arm and back of shoulder; hand of outside arm, back/shoulder blade, head (optional)
inside arm is holding the pole behind the body at the elbow, hand of outside arm is holding the pole above the inside elbow/at hip level
inside arm is in elbow grip, outside hand/arm is in grip of choice
both legs are fully extended in a position of choice and parallel to the pole with 20° tolerance. Legs are on the same side of the pole as the body (except inside arm)
